items.title_en: Jury selection kicks off in Musk v. Altman trial
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼案审判陪审团遴选开始
items.desc_en: The Musk v. Altman trial kicked off at a federal courthouse in Oakland, California, with jury selection followed by opening arguments.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼案的审判在加利福尼亚州奥克兰的联邦法院开始，首先选择陪审团，然后进行开场陈词。

items.title_en: Pharma bets a little-known form of cholesterol will underpin its next blockbuster heart drugs
items.title_zh: 制药公司押注一种鲜为人知的胆固醇将成为其下一款重磅心脏病药物的基础
items.desc_en: Novartis, Amgen and Eli Lilly are betting that slashing levels of a particularly bad form of cholesterol could deliver the next blockbusters in cardiology.
items.desc_zh: 诺华 (Novartis)、安进 (Amgen) 和礼来 (Eli Lilly) 押注，降低一种特别有害的胆固醇水平可能会带来心脏病学领域的下一个重磅炸弹。

items.title_en: Venice opera house drops incoming music director after nepotism remarks
items.title_zh: 因裙带关系言论，威尼斯歌剧院解雇了即将上任的音乐总监
items.desc_en: Beatrice Venezi's appointment had been marred in controversy since being announced last September, prompting orchestra members to go on strike.
items.desc_zh: 自从去年九月宣布任命比阿特丽斯·维内齐 (Beatrice Venezi) 以来，就一直饱受争议，导致乐团成员举行罢工。

items.title_en: Trump ballroom lawsuit plaintiff rejects DOJ demand to drop case after 'assassination attempt'
items.title_zh: 特朗普舞厅诉讼原告拒绝司法部在“暗杀企图”后撤销案件的要求
items.desc_en: Trump and others say the proposed White House ballroom would be much more secure than the Washington Hilton Hotel, where Saturday's shooting occurred.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普和其他人表示，拟议中的白宫宴会厅将比周六发生枪击事件的华盛顿希尔顿酒店安全得多。

items.desc_zh: 达里奥表示，如果凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）降息，可能会在关键时刻损害人们对央行的信心。

items.title_zh: 如果美国解除封锁并结束战争，伊朗将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并推迟核谈判：报告
items.desc_en: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府一再坚称，冲突的核心目标是阻止伊朗获得核武器。

items.title_en: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦被指控袭击阿富汗大学
items.desc_en: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士告诉 BBC，库纳尔省的空袭已造成至少 7 人死亡、75 人受伤。

items.title_en: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
items.title_zh: 枪手袭击尼日利亚孤儿院并绑架儿童
items.desc_en: The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 周日的袭击中，23 名儿童和该设施的老板娘被枪手绑架。

items.title_en: Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 14 on board
items.title_zh: 南苏丹客机失事 机上14人全部遇难
items.desc_en: The authorities are investigating but early reports suggest bad weather and poor visibility may be to blame.
items.desc_zh: 当局正在调查，但早期报告表明恶劣天气和能见度差可能是罪魁祸首。

items.title_zh: 科尔·艾伦 (Cole Allen) 因 WHCD 枪击案接受法庭传讯
items.desc_en: The Secret Service is facing scrutiny over security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where President Donald Trump was evacuated Saturday.

items.title_en: Prediction markets prepare to invade one of crypto’s biggest and riskiest trades
items.title_zh: 预测市场准备入侵加密货币最大、风险最高的交易之一
items.desc_en: There’s a landgrab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.
items.desc_zh: 美国正在争夺永续期货的土地，这是加密货币中规模最大、风险最高的部分之一，而预测市场也想从中分一杯羹。

items.title_zh: Spotify 与 Peloton 合作推出全球健身内容中心
items.desc_en: Spotify teams with Peloton to launch fitness content, potentially opening new revenue streams while expanding Peloton’s global reach.
items.desc_zh: Spotify 与 Peloton 合作推出健身内容，这可能会开辟新的收入来源，同时扩大 Peloton 的全球影响力。

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_en: Sri Lankan monks arrested after 110kg of cannabis discovered in their luggage
items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡僧侣在行李中发现110公斤大麻后被捕
items.desc_en: Officials say each monk was found with around 5kg of Kush - a particularly potent form of the drug - hidden within "false walls" in their luggage.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，每名僧侣在行李中的“假墙”内都发现了大约 5 公斤的库什药（一种药效特别强的药物）。

items.title_zh: 乍得水井纠纷升级 至少42人死亡

items.desc_zh: 争端最初发生在两个家庭之间，后来升级为报复性袭击的循环。

items.title_zh: 特朗普称金在安全会谈后访问美国期间“非常安全”
items.desc_en: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.
items.desc_zh: 尽管一名枪手瞄准了总统参加的活动，但国事访问仍将继续进行。

items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。
